_comment: Drop-in composer scripts for php-modernization. Paste contents into the `scripts` block of your composer.json. Aliases (cs:check, rector:check) match the verifier's expectations (PM-13/14/15) and align with skill orchestrator commands. The `skill:*` entries call the verifier and introspector directly via uv — keep them if you want pre-commit / CI parity with the skill harness.
